questions.question: Describe the key differences between the encoder and decoder components in the Encoder-Decoder model. How do these components interact to facilitate efficient machine translation?
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation of the role of each component

questions.question: What strategies can be employed to improve machine translation performance in low-resource language pairs? Provide two specific techniques from the literature.
questions.hint: Focus on empirical results and evaluation metrics

questions.question: Discuss the potential biases and ethical implications of machine translation systems. How can these biases be identified, mitigated, and addressed in the development of more responsible MT systems?
questions.hint: Examine the impact of biases on vulnerable populations and provide recommendations for improvement
